papers.title: CoCo-InEKF: State Estimation with Learned Contact Covariances in Dynamic, Contact-Rich Scenarios
Before the Body Moves: Learning Anticipatory Joint Intent for Language-Conditioned Humanoid Control

companyNews.title: Hyundai, Tesla Race to Profit From Humanoid Robots - Businesskorea
companyNews.summary: 现代与Tesla竞相开发人形机器人商业化技术，共同推动行业从研发走向盈利，表明人形机器人市场潜力巨大且竞争加剧。

companyNews.title: Robots from the likes of Tesla could be the next frontier in the AI revolution: Should you invest? - MSN
companyNews.summary: 人形机器人正成为AI技术落地的新兴领域，Tesla等科技巨头的布局可能加速行业商业化进程，同时也带来投资机遇与风险并存的局面。

companyNews.title: Boston Dynamics trains Atlas humanoid robot to pick up and place washing machine - Robotics & Automation News
companyNews.summary: Boston Dynamics训练Atlas人形机器人完成洗衣机的拿取和放置动作，展示其精确操作与平衡能力。这一进展标志着家务服务机器人向实际应用迈出重要一步。

companyNews.title: Hyundai Motor Group to deploy 25,000 Atlas robots across factories - The Korea Herald
companyNews.summary: 现代将部署2.5万台Atlas人形机器人进工厂，推动人形机器人在工业制造领域规模化应用。

companyNews.title: Atlas, can you bring me a drink? | Boston Dynamics - Hyundai Motor Group
companyNews.summary: Atlas已能执行取饮料等日常服务任务，标志人形机器人向家庭服务应用迈出关键一步。
